title: OPEN ELEMENTS IN CONNECT-BOARDS COLUMNS INTO ANOTHER TAB

posts.author: Office_Pri_Manager (Office Manager)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Would love to be able to open the elements in the Connect-boards columns in a new tab. Or at least when you click on it, it doesn’t just show that element’s columns but also the conversation side. Now if you click on it, you can only see the columns infos, but if you want to se the discussion related to that element and click on the bubble it takes you out of your current board into that elements board so I have to go all the way back again. I just want a sneak peak into that element without leaving the current board it’s connected to.

What are you trying to achieve

I hope you can add either the discussion side to the element view, or at least allow me to open the whole board it belongs in a new tab without quitting the current board it’s connected to. I hope it’s clear
